did.head: DESCRIPTIVE SUMMARY
did.unittitle: Office of the Vice President, Division of Campus Life records,

corpname.normal: Cornell University. Division of Campus Life.

origination.corpname: Cornell University. Division of Campus Life.

did.repository: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library
did.abstract: Records of William D. Gurowitz, including personnel, payroll, budget, and general office files.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Records of William D. Gurowitz, including personnel, payroll, budget, and general office files.

relatedmaterial.head: RELATED MATERIALS
relatedmaterial.p: See also Cornell University Office of the Vice President for Student Affairs Records, #4-6-904, Cornell University Office of the Vice President for Student Affairs Records, #4-6-1182, and Division of Student and Academic Services Records, #4-16-2926.

unittitle.extref: Link to a copy of the finding aid. PDF file.

accessrestrict.head: Access Restrictions:
accessrestrict.p: Access restricted to the permission of the office of origin.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Vice President for Campus Affairs, Division of Campus Life. Records. #4-6-1621. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
